title: Surface Builder
description: Controls the materials used for terrain generation.

builder.title: Builder
builder.description: Controls the block types used for terrain generation.

type.title: Type
type.description: Controls the type of surface builder to use.

type.title: Type
type.description: Controls the blocks used for the default Minecraft Overworld terrain generation.

foundation_material.title: Foundation Material
foundation_material.description: Controls the block type used deep underground in this biome.

mid_material.title: Mid Material
mid_material.description: Controls the block type used in a layer below the surface of this biome.

sea_floor_depth.title: Sea Floor Depth
sea_floor_depth.description: Controls how deep below the world water level the floor should occur.

sea_floor_material.title: Sea Floor Material
sea_floor_material.description: Controls the block type used as a floor for bodies of water in this biome.

sea_material.title: Sea Material
sea_material.description: Controls the block type used for the bodies of water in this biome.

top_material.title: Top Material
top_material.description: Controls the block type used for the surface of this biome.

type.title: Type
type.description: Controls the blocks used for the default Minecraft Overworld terrain generation, with the addition of icebergs.

foundation_material.title: Foundation Material
foundation_material.description: Controls the block type used deep underground in this biome.

sea_floor_depth.title: Sea Floor Depth
sea_floor_depth.description: Controls how deep below the world water level the floor should occur.

sea_floor_material.title: Sea Floor Material
sea_floor_material.description: Controls the block type used as a floor for bodies of water in this biome.

sea_material.description: Controls the block type used for the bodies of water in this biome.

type.title: Type
type.description: Controls the blocks used for the default Minecraft Overworld terrain generation, with the addition of colored strata and optional pillars.

bryce_pillars.title: Bryce Pillars
bryce_pillars.description: Whether the mesa generates with pillars.

foundation_material.title: Foundation Material
foundation_material.description: Controls the block type used deep underground in this biome.

has_forest.title: Has Forest
has_forest.description: Places coarse dirt and grass at high altitudes

mid_material.title: Mid Material
mid_material.description: Controls the block type used in a layer below the surface of this biome.

sea_floor_depth.title: Sea Floor Depth
sea_floor_depth.description: Controls how deep below the world water level the floor should occur.

sea_floor_material.title: Sea Floor Material
sea_floor_material.description: Controls the block type used as a floor for bodies of water in this biome.

sea_material.title: Sea Material
sea_material.description: Controls the block type used for the bodies of water in this biome.

top_material.title: Top Material
top_material.description: Controls the block type used for the surface of this biome.

type.title: Type
type.description: Controls the blocks used for the default Minecraft Overworld terrain generation, with added decoration to the surface of swamp biomes such as water lilies.

foundation_material.title: Foundation Material
foundation_material.description: Controls the block type used deep underground in this biome.

max_puddle_depth_below_sea_level.title: Max Puddle Depth Below Sea Level
max_puddle_depth_below_sea_level.description: Controls the depth at which surface level blocks can be replaced with water for puddles. The number represents the number of blocks (0, 127) below sea level that we will go down to look for a surface block.

mid_material.title: Mid Material
mid_material.description: Controls the block type used in a layer below the surface of this biome.

sea_floor_depth.title: Sea Floor Depth
sea_floor_depth.description: Controls how deep below the world water level the floor should occur.

sea_floor_material.title: Sea Floor Material
sea_floor_material.description: Controls the block type used as a floor for bodies of water in this biome.

sea_material.title: Sea Material
sea_material.description: Controls the block type used for the bodies of water in this biome.

top_material.title: Top Material
top_material.description: Controls the block type used for the surface of this biome.

type.title: Type
type.description: Generates surface on blocks with non-solid blocks above or below.

beach_material.title: Beach Material
beach_material.description: Material used to decorate surface near sea level.

ceiling_materials.title: Ceiling Materials
ceiling_materials.description: Materials used for the surface ceiling.

floor_materials.title: Floor Materials
floor_materials.description: Materials used for the surface floor.

foundation_material.title: Foundation Material
foundation_material.description: Material used to replace solid blocks that are not surface blocks.

sea_material.title: Sea Material
sea_material.description: Material used to replace air blocks below sea level.

type.title: Type
type.description: Use default Minecraft End terrain generation.

type.title: Type
type.description: Places continuous bands of blocks according to a noise distribution. This surface builder's processing has been implemented with sub-terrain height ranges in mind.

amplitudes.title: Amplitudes
amplitudes.description: Governs the attenuation of the first n octaves in the generated noise.

first_octave.title: First Octave
first_octave.description: Governs the general frequency characteristics of the generated noise. Lower value results in noise with lower frequency content.

gradient_blocks.title: Gradient Blocks
gradient_blocks.description: A list of block names that will be sampled according to a Perlin noise distribution. Specifying `minecraft:air`-blocks is permitted, and will result in the original block not being replaced, meaning it is possible to adjust the density/intensity of block replacement in the biome using this surface builder type.

noise_seed_string.title: Noise Seed String
noise_seed_string.description: The string used to initialize the noise. Has no impact on the qualitative aspects of the generated values.

non_replaceable_blocks.title: Non-Replaceable Blocks
non_replaceable_blocks.description: A list of blocks that the surface builder is not allowed to replace. Leaving this list empty or unspecified will allow the replacement of any (non-air) block type.
